about.description: Ethernal combines blockchain security with traditional financial planning to offer a decentralized, transparent and accessible retirement experience for everyone.

approve.title: Authorize USDC
approve.subtitle: Allow the Factory to move your tokens once

whatIs.title: What is Approve?
whatIs.description: On Ethereum, ERC-20 tokens (like USDC) require you to explicitly authorize a contract before it can move them. It is a security standard: the contract can only spend up to the amount you approve.
whatIs.note: This approval does not move any funds. The movement occurs in the next step.

create.title: Create the Fund
create.subtitle: The factory will deploy your personal contract and make the initial deposit

success.title: Fund Created!
success.subtitle: Your personal contract lives on the blockchain.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.step1: Make monthly deposits of {amount} to reach your goal.
nextSteps.step2: Monitor your progress and DeFi returns from the Dashboard.
nextSteps.step3: When the timelock expires, you can start the scheduled withdrawal.

feeModal.title: Your retirement, without intermediaries.
feeModal.subtitle: Calculate how much more you accumulate when fees work for you, not against you.

ethFees.label: Deposit fee
ethFees.desc: No hidden fees, no annual management, no standard exit penalties.

ethFees.label: Early withdrawal
ethFees.desc: Discourages short-termism. If you wait until maturity, it's 0%.

ethFees.label: Gas (Arbitrum L2)
ethFees.desc: Practically negligible vs any traditional alternative.

corpFees.label: Entry load
corpFees.desc: Charges from the first dollar, before investing.

corpFees.label: Annual management fee (TER)
corpFees.desc: Charged even if the fund performs negatively.

corpFees.label: Administration fee
corpFees.desc: Operating costs passed on to the investor.

corpFees.label: Performance fee
corpFees.desc: Only visible in the prospectus, rarely in statements.

feeModal.disclaimer: Indicative simulation · Real DeFi returns may vary · Not financial advice
